{{Infobox concept
| name = Virtues
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Elysian]] tests involve testing one's virtues.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Valor is an [[Elysian]] virtue that rewards the caller with [[gold light]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Selflessness is the key to most [[Elysian virtues]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
